_meta.purpose: Opening sentences in English for Saluja Dento Max. Natural, casual patient voice — not corporate. Dental anxiety → relief is the core emotion.
rules: Real patient writing style — not an ad
Vary length — short punchy and longer storytelling both
Dental fear angle is strong — many patients avoid dentists for years
Include child/family angle occasionally — multi-dentist clinic serves whole families

Was terrified of dentists before this visit — not anymore.
Had been putting off this treatment for years out of fear.
Came here after a bad experience at another clinic and what a difference.
Really glad I finally found a reliable dentist in Kanpur.

Can't believe how painless the whole thing was.
Genuinely one of the best decisions I made for my health this year.
Have been recommending this clinic to everyone since my visit.

The results speak for themselves.
